meaning: n.盖屋顶的人,客人对主人道谢的函
examples: I had to become a fully-fledged roofer.
If I'd been a roofer, we might still be together.
It was that a Moscow roofer had bothered to stand up and object.
But she said her husband, a retired roofer, said he would take him for an hour.
On April 5th Russell Henderson, a local roofer, was sentenced to two consecutive life terms in prison for killing him.
